name: magic fountain
hints: You are inside the magic fountain! There is a star here - one of the 13 you need to collect.
GET STAR - this is one of the 13 stars needed to defeat the sorcerer. GO CENTER to climb to the top of the fountain.
GET STAR, then GO CENTER to reach the top of the fountain (room 6) which has an air shaft and water outlet.
notes: Inside the magic fountain in the courtyard. Contains a *STAR* (treasure). GO CENTER climbs to the top of the fountain (room 6) which connects to an air shaft and water outlet. One of 13 stars to collect.
